mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_groups (name, intro, group_image, owner_id, deleted_at) VALUES (#{name}, #{intro}, #{groupImage}, #{ownerId}, #{deletedAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE user_groups SET member_count = member_count + 1 WHERE group_id = #{groupId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE user_groups SET member_count = member_count - 1 WHERE group_id = #{groupId} AND deleted_at IS NULL AND member_count > 0
mapper.select: SELECT group_id, name, intro, group_image, owner_id, member_count, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at FROM user_groups WHERE group_id = #{groupId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT u.user_id, u.nickname, u.profile_image FROM group_members gm JOIN users u ON u.user_id = gm.user_id WHERE gm.group_id = #{groupId} AND u.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY gm.created_at, u.user_id

SELECT g.group_id, g.name, g.intro, g.group_image, g.owner_id, u.nickname AS owner_nickname, g.member_count FROM user_groups g JOIN users u ON u.user_id = g.owner_id WHERE g.group_id = #{groupId} AND g.deleted_at IS NULL AND u.deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM group_members WHERE group_id = #{groupId} AND user_id = #{userId})

SELECT DENSE_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY ranked.post_count DESC) AS ranking, ranked.user_id, ranked.nickname, ranked.profile_image, ranked.post_count FROM (SELECT gm.user_id, u.nickname, u.profile_image, COUNT(p.post_id) AS post_count FROM group_members gm JOIN users u ON u.user_id = gm.user_id LEFT JOIN posts p ON p.user_id = gm.user_id AND p.deleted_at IS NULL AND p.created_at >= #{startAt} AND p.created_at < #{endAt} WHERE gm.group_id = #{groupId} AND u.deleted_at IS NULL GROUP BY gm.user_id) ranked

SELECT gm.user_id FROM group_members gm JOIN user_groups ug ON ug.group_id = gm.group_id JOIN users u ON u.user_id = gm.user_id WHERE gm.group_id IN (SELECT my_group.group_id FROM group_members my_group JOIN user_groups my_ug ON my_ug.group_id = my_group.group_id WHERE my_group.user_id = #{memberId} AND my_ug.deleted_at IS NULL) AND ug.deleted_at IS NULL AND u.deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT g.group_id, g.name, g.group_image FROM group_members gm INNER JOIN user_groups g ON gm.group_id = g.group_id WHERE gm.user_id = #{userId} AND g.deleted_at IS NULL
